description_long: This doll features a stylized, chibi-like figure with a large head, expressive pink eyes, and a small body. The doll has long, straight black hair with orange tips and a pink ribbon tied on the right side. It wears a traditional Japanese kimono in shades of pink and brown, with a checkered pattern on the inner garment and a black haori over it. A prominent green bamboo gag is held in the doll's mouth, and it stands barefoot with a wooden box accessory nearby. The overall design is highly detailed, with careful attention to the layered clothing, hair strands, and facial features.
description: A chibi-style doll with long black-to-orange hair, pink eyes, a pink kimono, and a green bamboo gag, accompanied by a wooden box accessory.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, pink eyes, bamboo gag, kimono details, and the wooden box accessory.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlighting the back of the hair, pink ribbon, and the side of the wooden box.
description_view_2: Direct rear view focusing on the long, straight hair with orange tips and the pink ribbon.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view from the opposite side, showing the hair, part of the kimono, and the wooden box.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional Japanese kimono with a pink geometric-patterned undergarment, a brown outer haori, a white and red obi belt, and a black checkered sash, inspired by Taisho-era fashion.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent and extended forward, head facing forward, legs close together, and torso straight.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide, open pink eyes and a bamboo gag covering the mouth, eyebrows relaxed.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight black hair with orange tips, loose and flowing, adorned with a pink ribbon on the right side.
